task_completion.description: Verify that the chest CT scan is loaded and visible in the slice viewers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface should show axial, coronal, and/or sagittal views containing chest anatomy (lungs, spine, ribs).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Markups module or toolbar was accessed to create a marker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Markups module panel is open in the sidebar, or the 'Place a Point' icon in the toolbar is highlighted/active.

task_completion.description: Verify that a fiducial point marker has been added to the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A point marker (often a crosshair or colored dot) is visible on the slice views, or a new row exists in the Markups list table.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fiducial marker is correctly named 'Carina'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Markups module list, the 'Name' column for the created point displays the text 'Carina'.

task_completion.description: Verify the point is placed centrally within the airway at the bifurcation level in the axial view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the axial (transverse) view, the marker is located inside the dark air-filled trachea, specifically where the single tube shape elongates or begins to split into two separate circles.

task_completion.description: Verify the point is placed at the apex of the bifurcation (the carina) in the coronal view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the coronal (front) view, the marker is located precisely at the 'crotch' or tip of the inverted-V/Y shape formed by the trachea splitting into the left and right main bronchi.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GUI tools (Markups module) rather than purely scripting the solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Markups toolbar or panel, rather than just text entry into the Python console.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is interacting with the actual 3D Slicer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the full 3D Slicer interface with standard menus, slice viewers, and panels, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not access external files or websites to copy coordinates.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent focuses on the Slicer window and does not show browser windows with coordinate data or text files containing ground truth answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target structure is the Tracheal Carina. Anatomically, this is located at vertebral level T4-T6. In the Coronal view, it appears as an inverted-V or Y shape where the trachea splits. In the Axial view, it is the point where the single circular trachea divides into two bronchi. The expected fiducial name is 'Carina'.
